name: stackra/public-site
purpose: Public marketing site content — PublicPage catalogue and ContentBlock composable content served under the central host with SEO metadata.
capabilities: PublicPage Eloquent model (pge_...) with slug + status
ContentBlock composable content blocks per Page
when_to_use: Authoring the Stackra marketing site content without a code change on the central host.
when_not_to_use: For tenant-facing UI on the tenant host, the frontend module system owns those screens directly.
